chapter_title.ar: رِسَالَةٌ مِنْهُ ( عليه السلام ) إِلَيْهِ أَيْضاً
chapter_title.en: A MESSAGE (LETTER) AS WELL FROM HIM <sup>asws</sup> TO HIM

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5 / 130)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5 / 130)
text: قُلْتُ قَوْلُ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ لا تُفْسِدُوا فِي الْأَرْضِ بَعْدَ إِصْلاحِها قَالَ فَقَالَ يَا مُيَسِّرُ إِنَّ الْأَرْضَ كَانَتْ فَاسِدَةً فَأَصْلَحَهَا اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ بِنَبِيِّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَقَالَ وَ لا تُفْسِدُوا فِي الْأَرْضِ بَعْدَ إِصْلاحِها .

en.hubeali: H 14468 – And from him, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Ibn Muskan, from Muyassar has narrated:

It was said to Abu Ja’farasws about the Statement of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic: “[7:56] Do no mischief on the earth, after it hath been set in order”, so heasws said: ‘O Muyassar, verily the earth used to be in a state of disorder, so Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic Corrected it by Hisazwj Prophetsaww, therefore Heazwj Said:“[7:56] Do no mischief on the earth, after it hath been set in order”.
en.sarwar: 20. And from him, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Ibn Muskan, from Muyassar has narrated: It was said to Abu Ja’far (a.s.) about the Statement of Allah (azwj) Mighty and Majestic: “[7:56] Do no mischief on the earth, after it hath been set in order”, so he (a.s.) said: ‘O Muyassar, verily the earth used to be in a state of disorder, so Allah (azwj) Mighty and Majestic Corrected it by His (azwj) Prophet (saww), therefore He (azwj) Said:“[7:56] Do no mischief on the earth, after it hath been set in order”.
